title: Annual Science Fair Announced
summary: Get ready for the Annual Science Fair! Students are encouraged to register their projects by next month.

title: School Sports Week Coming Soon
summary: The school’s sports week kicks off this May. Exciting games and prizes await!

title: New Library Books Arrived
summary: Hundreds of new books have been added to the school library. Visit and explore now!

title: Parent-Teacher Meeting Scheduled
summary: A parent-teacher meeting will be held next week to discuss students' progress.

title: Art Exhibition Opening Soon
summary: Students’ artwork will be displayed in the annual Art Exhibition. All are welcome!

title: Scholarship Applications Open
summary: Applications for academic scholarships are now open. Apply before the deadline!

title: New Computer Lab Inaugurated
summary: A state-of-the-art computer lab has been inaugurated for better learning experiences.

title: Summer Camp Registrations Open
summary: Join the fun this summer! Registrations for the summer camp are now open.

title: New Cafeteria Menu Released
summary: The cafeteria has introduced a new healthy menu for students and staff.

title: Alumni Meet 2025 Announced
summary: We are excited to announce the Alumni Meet 2025. Former students are invited to register.

title: Environmental Awareness Campaign
summary: An environmental campaign will be held next week. Let’s make our planet greener together!

title: New Robotics Club Formed
summary: A Robotics Club has been formed for tech enthusiasts. Join and build the future!
